videos.title: Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo 'PLANTS HIS FLAG' to win skiathlon gold | Winter Olympics 2026 | NBC Sports
videos.description:
Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo's Olympic campaign began with a fearsome win in men’s skiathlon on Sunday in Italy, coming from behind in the final stretch to win gold. #NBCSports #WinterOlympics #Skiing 
» Subscribe to NBC Sports: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports?sub_confirmation=1

videos.title: Sweden’s Frida Karlsson clinches gold in women's skiathlon | Winter Olympics 2026 | NBC Sports
videos.description:
With an impressive lead in the race, Sweden's Frida Karlsson won the women's skiathlon on the first day of cross-country skiing competition at Milan Cortina. #NBCSports #WinterOlympics #Skiing 
» Subscribe to NBC Sports: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports?sub_confirmation=1
» Live Olympic coverage on NBCOlympics.com: https://www.nbcolympics.com/schedule
